strategy_snippets: ["Running with the haystack metaphor, here\u2019s how we use automation and machine learning to find more needles in bigger haystacks, and save our investors from picking through the chaff.", "However, if we focus too much on making a big haystack \u2013 say we add a lot of new sources with a low signal to noise ratio (ie, lots of irrelevant companies) \u2013 it makes it difficult for a magnet to find the needles, no matter how good it is.", "It\u2019s a compromise, then, between two mistakes: do you use up more of the investor\u2019s time by making them look through more companies (because your model was too lenient), or risk missing out on really good companies (because your model was too strict).", "We only started running this machine learning pipeline in April, and it\u2019s been a game-changer. Not only can it find companies that investors might never have looked at, it can surface them earlier.
